description: This Java class defines configuration properties for Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) in a Spring Boot application. It includes settings for OTP delivery, development fallback OTP inclusion, and logging OTPs upon delivery failure.

classes.name: MfaProperties
classes.description: A Spring Boot configuration properties class that encapsulates MFA-related settings such as delivery enablement, development OTP return, and logging OTPs on failure.

methods.name: isDeliveryEnabled
methods.description: Getter for the deliveryEnabled property, indicates if OTP delivery is enabled.

methods.name: isDevReturnOtp
methods.description: Getter for the devReturnOtp property, indicates if dev/test OTPs are included in API responses.

methods.name: isLogOtpOnFailure
methods.description: Getter for the logOtpOnFailure property, indicates if OTPs are logged on failure.
